name: Group of Twenty
climate: All major climate zones represented: tropical, arid, temperate, continental, polar

neighbors.name: Group of Seven
neighbors.relevance: G7 is core advanced-economy caucus within G20; sets agenda on many issues

neighbors.name: BRICS+
neighbors.relevance: Major emerging-economy bloc within G20; counterweight to G7 positions

neighbors.name: European Union
neighbors.relevance: EU has its own G20 seat alongside individual European member states

neighbors.name: ASEAN
neighbors.relevance: Indonesia is G20 member; ASEAN economies are systemic trade partners

neighbors.name: OPEC+
neighbors.relevance: Saudi Arabia and Russia in both G20 and OPEC+; energy prices dominate G20 macro agenda

neighbors.name: African Union
neighbors.relevance: AU gained permanent G20 seat; South Africa represents broader African interests

links.description: All G7 members are G20 members; G7 coordinates positions within G20 framework
All original BRICS members are in G20; competing governance visions within the forum
Several G20 members (China, Japan, Korea, Australia, Indonesia) are in RCEP
G20 energy discussions directly shaped by OPEC+ production decisions
USA, Canada, Mexico all G20 members; North American trade bloc within G20
Brazil and Argentina link G20 to South American trade integration
EU participates as institution plus France, Germany, Italy as individual members
China, Russia, India, Turkey bridge G20 and SCO membership
